items.title: Tailwind CSS 4.2 Ships Webpack Plugin, New Palettes and Logical Property Utilities
items.summaryShort: Tailwind CSS 4.2 Ships Webpack Plugin, New Palettes and Logical Property Utilities. Tailwind CSS version 4.2.0, released on February 18, 2026, includes a webpack plugin for streamlined integration and four new color palettes.

items.title: Cloudflare and ETH Zurich Outline Approaches for AI-Driven Cache Optimization
items.summaryShort: Cloudflare and ETH Zurich Outline Approaches for AI-Driven Cache Optimization. Cloudflare and ETH Zurich highlight how AI-driven crawler traffic challenges traditional caching in CDNs and databases.

items.title: GitHub Actions Custom Runner Images Reach General Availability
items.summaryShort: GitHub Actions Custom Runner Images Reach General Availability. GitHub has just announced the availability of custom images for its hosted runners.

items.title: Presentation: Local First – How To Build Software Which Still Works After the Acquihire
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Local First – How To Build Software Which Still Works After the Acquihire. Alex Good discusses the fragility of modern cloud-dependent apps and shares a roadmap for "local-first" software.

items.title: Article: Stateful Continuation for AI Agents: Why Transport Layers Now Matter
items.summaryShort: Article: Stateful Continuation for AI Agents: Why Transport Layers Now Matter. Agent workflows make transport a first-order concern.

items.title: WireGuard VPN developer can't ship software updates after Microsoft locks account
items.summaryShort: WireGuard VPN developer can't ship software updates after Microsoft locks account. The popular open source VPN maker is the second high-profile developer to say Microsoft locked his account without notifying him and is blocking their abilit

items.title: A self-driving car in Texas hit and killed a mother duck, sparking neighborhood outrage
items.summaryShort: A self-driving car in Texas hit and killed a mother duck, sparking neighborhood outrage. An Avride autonomous vehicle near Austin hit the duck, facing backlash from the community.

items.title: Poke makes using AI agents as easy as sending a text
items.summaryShort: Poke makes using AI agents as easy as sending a text. Poke brings AI agents to everyday users via text message by handling tasks and automations without complex setup, apps, or technical know-how.
